title: hieracium glaucum subsp. isaricum
intro: Hieracium glaucum subsp. isaricum is a subspecies of the Hieracium glaucum plant, commonly known as the 'Glaucous Hawkweed', a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium glaucum subsp. isaricum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
